title: Creating New Contacts from Tickets
excerpt: Does Service support creating New Contacts from Tickets?

posts.author: JuliParker (Juli Parker)
posts.cookedHtml: Does Service support creating New Contacts from Tickets?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Definitely! Do you have Enterprise or Pro?

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: JuliParker (Juli Parker)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for replaying to my question - I use Enterprise.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Perfect! Then yes, it can definitely be done with the workflow center. ie when item created, IF that email address is already on the contacts board, then connect. If that email is NOT, then create a new item on the contacts board and connect them.

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: JuliParker (Juli Parker)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you! It makes sense. Do you know if there is a way to have the client’s name extracted from the domain not using AI? (I tried AI and the results are not always accurate)
